identity.mission: Create a luxury mixology portfolio that feels like a high-end lounge experience. Avoid generic 'dark mode' tropes; use deep textures, sophisticated typography, and meaningful negative space.
identity.emotional_tone: Sophisticated, Intimate, Exclusive, Masterful, Liquid Art
identity.target_audience: Luxury event planners, high-net-worth individuals, premium hospitality venues

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and cocktail names. Use distinct letter spacing for uppercase.

body.usage: Descriptions, ingredients, contact details. Clean and legible at small sizes.

textures.marble: Use the black marble image as a subtle background overlay with low opacity (10-20%) on specific sections (Hero, Footer).
textures.grain: Add a global noise/grain overlay (opacity 0.03) to prevent digital flatness.

buttons.primary: Border: 1px solid #D4AF37. Text: #D4AF37. Hover: Bg #D4AF37, Text #0A0A0A. Transition: all 0.3s ease.
buttons.secondary: Text-only with gold underline on hover.
buttons.radius: rounded-none (Sharp edges for elegance) or rounded-sm

cards.style: Glassmorphism. Bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.03). Border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05). Hover: Border #D4AF37/50.
cards.content: Cocktail image top (aspect-square or 4:5), Name (Playfair), Description (Lato light).

navigation.style: Sticky top, backdrop-blur-md, border-b border-white/5. Logo: Gold text.

timeline.style: Vertical line (gold). Dots for milestones. Alternating left/right content for desktop.

contact_form.inputs: Bg: transparent. Border-bottom: 1px solid #333. Focus: Border-bottom #D4AF37. No rounded corners.

grid_system.gallery: Bento Grid or Masonry. Do not use equal squares. Make 'Signature' cocktails span 2 cols.
grid_system.hero: Full viewport height (100vh). Centered text or Split (Text Left / Image Right).

hero.alt: Alex Sterling crafting a signature cocktail

cocktails.name: The Obsidian Martini
cocktails.desc: Gin, Dry Vermouth, Black Olive Brine, Activated Charcoal.

cocktails.name: Golden Hour Sour
cocktails.desc: Whiskey, Lemon, Egg White, Gold Leaf Garnish.

cocktails.name: Velvet Merlot
cocktails.desc: Red Wine Reduction, Cognac, Spiced Berry Smoke.

cocktails.name: Crystal Clear
cocktails.desc: Clarified Milk Punch, Pineapple, Rum, Coconut Water.

cocktails.name: Nightshade
cocktails.desc: Blackberry Liqueur, Vodka, Thyme, Lemon Twist.

cocktails.name: Amber Old Fashioned
cocktails.desc: Aged Rum, Maple Syrup, Angostura Bitters, Orange Peel.

cocktails.name: Gilded Cage
cocktails.desc: Champagne, Elderflower St. Germain, Gold Dust.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for all animations. Use 'lucide-react' for icons.
Implement a 'Smooth Scroll' wrapper if possible using 'lenis' or just native scroll-behavior: smooth.
Use the provided 'black_marble' texture as a background for the 'Certifications' or 'Contact' section to break visual monotony.
Ensure the 'Contact' form sends a mailto: link on submit. No backend required.
Use 'Playfair Display' for the big tagline 'Crafting Liquid Art'.
For the Gallery: Create a responsive grid. On mobile: 1 col. On Desktop: 3 or 4 cols. Use aspect-ratio-square for images.
NAVIGATION: Create a simple sticky navbar with links: Portfolio, Certifications, Contact.
FOOTER: Minimalist. '© 2025 Alex Sterling. The Art of Mixology.' with social icons.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'on distribution' outputs. Create distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
